title: GH Pack
description: Modpack for use on our private minecraft GamingHorses server.
body:
## About this pack
- GH Client is a small collection of mostly client-side mods designed to enhance your experience with the Create Mod on Fabric.
- This modpack adds select mods with the objective of providing a better Minecraft world or server experience, without overwhelming you with unnecessary additions.
 

 
## 📥Installation
-Install with the modrinth launcher for ease.
